extension.summary: Mark and auto-skip commercials from inside Kodi
extension.description: Fix commercial timestamps during playback with a simple on-screen overlay. Verified segments are written to an EDL sidecar file next to the recording, which Kodi auto-skips on the next playback. Optionally seeds from Plex DVR (comskip) draft markers. Requires direct file playback and a writable media source.
extension.news: 0.4.1 — Beat-2 toast: clearer "Go back" label (was "Undo" — nothing was written yet, the button just returns). 0.4.0 — the two beats: landing detector (onPlayBackSeek) fires a Keep/Undo toast for any skip matching a draft; Beat-1 skip offer when PKC is absent. Only an explicit Keep writes the EDL. 0.3.1 — service fetches draft commercial markers automatically at playback start (published to a window property). 0.3.0 — M1 brick 1: Plex bridge (ratingKey resolution via PKC's plex.db, zero-config server+token from PKC settings, draft commercial marker fetch) + 'diag' entry point. 0.2.0 — 'e' shortcut also works in the video OSD; pause-summoned overlay focuses Close. 0.1.0 — M0 scaffold: manual mark → EDL sidecar → auto-skip on next play.
